title: Verify abandon and artifact cleanup
preconditions: Success, failure, crash, incomplete, completed, and abandoned INGEST artifact trees exist beside protected caller-owned sources and LEDGER data.
steps: Run automatic startup cleanup, explicit abandon, rejected resumable cleanup, and explicit completed cleanup while inventorying permissions and hashes.
expected: Every acceptance criterion of FR-INGEST-ARTIFACT-CLEANUP holds; only eligible INGEST artifacts are removed, protected state remains, and permissions are owner-only.
